Registry / Terms / measurement transducer

measurement transducer

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01015 · 5 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 4 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

4 distinct definitions across 5 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
a part of the meter that transforms the flow of the liquid to be measured into a signal(s) which is (are) sent to the calculator. It may either be autonomous or use an external power source
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20101998OIML R 81:19983.601015pending
202X1998OIML R 81:19983.601015pending

3 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2024OIML R049-1:20243.1.202341-R049-1
part of the meter that transforms the flow rate (3.3.1) or volume of water to be measured into signals which are passed to the calculator (3.1.40 and includes the sensor (3.1.3)
pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007T.1.201989
part of the meter which transforms the flow of the gas to be measured into signals which are passed to the calculator. It may be autonomous or use an external power source
pending
20102006OIML R 49-1:20062.1.200412
part of the meter which transforms the flow or the volume of the For the purposes of this Recommendation, the water to be measured into signals which are passed to the measure calculator. It can be based on a mechanical, or an electrical, or sensor an electronic principle. It may be autonomous or use an external power source
pending
